## What changed, and why

## Evidence

Numbers, not adjectives. Paste what you measured, or say why nothing needed
measuring.

```
pnpm test
pnpm typecheck
pnpm build
pnpm e2e
```

## Checklist

- [ ] The phase in `STATUS.md` authorises this change.
- [ ] Non-trivial behaviour leaves one runnable check behind.
- [ ] No new runtime dependency, or one justified above.
- [ ] Nothing private in the attached traces or screenshots.
